description:
Requirement statuses drift out of sync because they aren't automatically updated when linked tasks complete. The daemon's `sync_task_status_for_workflow_result` updates task statuses on workflow completion, but there's no equivalent hook for requirements.

Add a `compute_requirement_status()` function that derives requirement status from linked task statuses. When all linked tasks are `done`, the requirement should be promoted to `done`. When at least one linked task is `in-progress`, the requirement should be `in-progress`.

Integration point: call this after `sync_task_status_for_workflow_result` in the daemon scheduler tick, or as a separate reconciliation step in `run_ready_task_workflows_for_project`.

Key files:
- `crates/orchestrator-core/src/services.rs` — ServiceHub task/requirement methods
- `crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_scheduler_project_tick.rs` — daemon tick where task status sync happens
- `crates/orchestrator-core/src/domain_state.rs` — requirement persistence
title: Auto-promote requirement status when all linked tasks complete
